response.justification: Candidate is an individual contributor (Staff/Senior Software Engineer) with no evidence of executive leadership, no record of scaling engineering organizations to 10-30+, and only light agentic-AI exposure described as contributions to MCP tooling rather than production multi-agent systems. The resume also contains significant timeline and technology anachronisms (e.g., WordPress/Node.js usage in the mid-1990s, k8s/node.js at GISCollective from 2002, overlapping full-time roles), which raise credibility concerns for an executive hire. Fintech exposure is limited and no AI-in-regulated-environments experience is demonstrated.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack background across web, mobile, embedded, and DevOps
Some exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Active in developer community via workshops, OSS projects, and teaching
concerns: No CTO/VP/Head-of-Engineering experience and no evidence of leading or scaling teams of 10-30+
Production multi-agent AI systems and regulated-fintech AI experience not demonstrated
Multiple chronological and technology anachronisms undermine resume credibility

key_factors.factor: Insufficient production agentic-AI and regulated-fintech depth
